options.content: Each row below is **one `agent.run` trace = one user message** sent to efferent. Click a row's **Trace ID** to open the full execution waterfall (`agent.run → agent.turn → llm.generate / agent.tool / agent.subagent`). Click a **conversation id** to drill into just that conversation's messages, or open the **Conversation drill-down** link (top-right) and paste an id. Filtered to `service.name = efferent` (real sessions; evals live in their own folder).

panels.title: Recent messages (newest first) — click a conversation id to drill in

targets.query: { resource.service.name = "efferent" && name = "agent.run" } | select(span.agent.conversation_id, span.agent.prompt, span.agent.model, span.agent.turns, span.agent.total_input_tokens, span.agent.total_output_tokens)
